title: uragoga longicollis
intro: Uragoga longicollis, also known as the "Cape gooseberry" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Uragoga longicollis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Uragoga longicollis often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
